message.reasoning_content: We need to evaluate the source: "Are-LLMs-the-Master-of-All-Trades-Exploring-Domain-Agnostic-Reasoning-Skills-of-LLMs" from GitHub. So likely it is not applicable. However, we must be strict: only say yes if it concretely improves one of those modules. I don't see a concrete improvement. They might have some evaluation framework? But that's not a module enhancement. The source is a comparison of LLMs, not a technique. So answer {"applicable": false}.
